title: Alaska Lawyer Referral Service
details: The Attorney General and Department of Law staff may not provide legal advice to private citizens or organizations. Please contact an attorney if you need legal advice.TheAlaska Lawyer Referral Serviceor your local bar association may be able to assist you in locating a lawyer.

title: Full Article Here
details: The case involved work from “current and retired agent and officers” in the Surry County Sheriff’s Office, the State Bureau of Investigations, the State Crime Lab, the State Bureau Cold Case Unit, the Forsyth County Sheriff’s Office, and the South Carolina Law Enforcement Division and Stokes County Sheriff’s Office, the release said.
